name: Community Impact
description: A two-column highlight block showcasing community impact. Left column is a large green-toned photo with a caption overlay; right column has eyebrow + heading + body + a green CTA button.

field_schema.label: Eyebrow
field_schema.help: A small, uppercase label displayed above the main heading (e.g. 'Community impact').

field_schema.label: Heading
field_schema.help: The primary title of the section.

field_schema.label: Body
field_schema.help: The main descriptive text — what the impact looks like in numbers and partners.

field_schema.label: Call to action
field_schema.help: Green button linking to a deeper impact story or report.

field_schema.label: Image
field_schema.help: Wide, candid photo of the community / partner activity. Landscape composition works best.

field_schema.label: Image caption (placeholder only)
field_schema.help: Monospace overlay caption, only visible when no photo is set.

test_data.heading: 5% of every booking funds a village school.
test_data.body: Since 2019, we've helped build two classrooms and funded 47 scholarships in Ba Be Province. Our partner, the Ma Pi Leng Learning Initiative, is run by former guide Minh.

image.alt: Vietnamese kids waving hello in a mountain village
